Ethylene Glycol is emitted from an intermittent venting source, frequency of venting decreased due to stable operations and thus, so did ethylene glycol emissions. 
Losses from storage tanks estimated more conservatively, increasing estimate from previous years (total storage losses are low due to low vapour pressure of product).
